# matomo_tagmanager_trigger_types (Data Source)

Lists every trigger type available in a given Tag Manager context, including third-party-plugin-contributed ones.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "matomo_tagmanager_trigger_types" "web" {
  context = "web"
}

output "available_trigger_types" {
  value = [for t in data.matomo_tagmanager_trigger_types.web.trigger_types : t.id]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `context` (String) The Tag Manager context to query, e.g. "web". See the matomo_tagmanager_contexts data source for valid values.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Set to the context value this data source was queried with.
- `trigger_types` (Attributes List) Every trigger type available in the given context. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--trigger_types))

<a id="nestedatt--trigger_types"></a>
### Nested Schema for `trigger_types`

Read-Only:

- `category` (String) The category this type is grouped under in Matomo's UI.
- `description` (String) The type's description.
- `id` (String) The type's id, e.g. "CustomHtml".
- `name` (String) The type's display name.
